headline: A compact command center for the Royals season

latest_prospect_update.name: Blake Mitchell
latest_prospect_update.note: Most obvious remaining minor-league prospect to track; catcher development and power/patience are the main signals. Recent line: .160 / .323 / .160.

nightly_recap: The Royals beat the St. Louis Cardinals, KC 6, STL 5. Seth Lugo led the night, working 6.0 innings with 1 earned runs, 0 strikeouts and 3 walks. Salvador Perez supplied the loudest Royals contact at 110.7 mph.

player_of_game.name: Seth Lugo
player_of_game.reason: worked 6.0 innings with 1 earned runs, 0 strikeouts and 3 walks.
